prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约2664名→3186名→5109名→4985名→5483名，整体呈明显后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2300名；2025年基准约5483名，较20 24年略有后移；本省理科/物理类计划2021年60人、2022年61人、2023年58人、2024年70人、2025年84人；2026年计划75人，较2025年缩招约10.7%，竞争 有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第29名（2021年第29→2022年第28→2023年第31→2024年第29→2025年第30→2026年第29 ），稳居全国Top30，属于顶尖师范类院校；2026年声誉文件中无华东师范大学相关负面事件记录；抖音热度总排名第28位（评价"较热"，综合热度约170万）， 短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度较高；未见投档断档或异常记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共14个学科：教育学A+、统计学A+、体育学A+、心理学 A、中国语言文学A、数学A、地理学A、世界史A、生态学A、软件工程A、外国语言文学A-、物理学A-、生物学A-、马克思主义理论A-；优势学科数量多、覆盖面广，对考生吸引力 强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等专业持续高热推荐；师范/教育类呈分化观望；本省2026年考生总数约45.1万（较2025年约46.2万略降约2.4 %），物理类估算约31.3万（较2025年32.1万略降），竞争压力略有缓解；华东师范大学位于上海市（非本省），属跨省 报考；上海作为一线城市对安徽考生有较强吸引力，地域偏好正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准5483名、2026年计划缩招约10.7%（使位次前移）、本省物理类考生略减（ 使竞争略有缓和）以及学校声誉稳定偏正面等因素；考虑缩招效应为主、考生略减为辅，预测最低位次约5101名，区间4601–5601名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 2664 → 3186 → 5109 → 4985 → 5483, showing a clear backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2300 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 5483, slightly backward compared to 2024; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 60 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 84 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 75, a reduction of about 10.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (29th in 2021 → 28th in 2022 → 31st in 2023 → 29th in 2024 → 30th in 2025 → 29th in 2026), consistently in the national Top 30, belonging to top-tier normal universities; no negative incidents related to East China Normal University were recorded in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin heat ranking is 28th (rated 'relatively hot', comprehensive heat about 1.7 million), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting high application attention; no records of file dropping or anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Education A+, Statistics A+, Physical Education A+, Psychology A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Mathematics A, Geography A, World History A, Ecology A, Software Engineering A, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, Physics A-, Biology A-, Marxist Theory A-; the number of advantageous disciplines is large and covers a wide range, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Mathematics/Statistics continue to be highly recommended; teacher training/education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 451,000 (slightly down by about 2.4% from about 462,000 in 2025), with the physics category estimated at about 313,000 (slightly down from 321,000 in 2025), easing competitive pressure slightly; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai (not in the province), a cross-provincial application; Shanghai, as a first-tier city, has a strong attraction for Anhui candidates, with a positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline of 5483, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 10.7% (which shifts rankings forward), a slight decrease in provincial physics category candidates (which eases competition slightly), and a stable and positive university reputation; considering the reduction effect as the main factor and the candidate decrease as a secondary factor, the predicted minimum ranking is about 5101, with a range of 4601–5601.

- Psychology (Dual Degree) (with Computer Science and Technology Dual Degree).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4601–5601, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Data Science, Statistics, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Statistics Dual Degree, Mathematics, Computer Science, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Physics, Chemistry, Biology, etc.) as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4601), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (near 5601), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 479 → 644 → 617 → 1088 → 934, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to the exam mode switch (liberal arts → history category), the ranking notably dropped, with a slight recovery in 2025; the 2025 baseline is approximately 934. Provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans: 34 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, a reduction of about 13.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 30, belonging to top-tier normal universities. The 2026 reputation file contains no negative incidents related to East China Normal University; Douyin heat total ranking 28th (rated 'relatively hot'), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; no record of enrollment gaps or anomalies, overall reputation stable and positive. Strong disciplines: Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Psychology A, World History A, Statistics A+, Marxist Theory A-, etc. Liberal arts enrollment majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, History, Law, and Education all have strong disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially popular and recommended; teacher/education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 451,000 (slightly down about 2.4% from about 462,000 in 2025), with history category estimated at about 138,000 (slightly down from 141,000 in 2025), easing competitive pressure slightly. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a cross-province application; Shanghai has strong regional appeal for Anhui liberal arts examinees, a positive factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline of 934, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 13.5% (which moves the ranking forward), a slight decrease in provincial history category examinees (which slightly eases competition), and a stable to positive university reputation, considering the enrollment reduction effect as primary and the examinee decrease as secondary, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 838, with a range of 737–939.
